summary: ROS2 Nav2 navigation bridge: api_server.py L232-246 sends ros2 action send_goal /navigate_to_pose via Docker exec. BUT launch/, maps/, rviz/, config/ directories are empty (.gitkeep only) — no ROS2 package source code in repo. This confirms PARTIAL status.

YOLOv5 CSPDarknet backbone verified: fire_smoke_detection/yolov5_runtime/models/common.py L48-59 defines BottleneckCSP class with Cross Stage Partial network. FPN config at yolov5-fpn.yaml. Model weights at model/best.pt (14.7MB). Claim fully BACKED.

Multi-car DARP/A* claim PARTIAL: multi_car_coordinator.py has basic framework (registration, polling, collision detection, formation control) but grep 'darp|DARP|astar|A*|heuristic|路径规划|区域划分' returns zero matches. No DARP algorithm or A* path planning implemented.

Android APP completely missing: grep for Android source code (Kotlin/Java/build.gradle) across repo returns zero mobile app source files. RAG knowledge base FG-018 explicitly states Android is '规划' (planned), not implemented.

All other 8 claims verified against code: YOLO detector (BACKED), Agent voice ASR/LLM/TTS pipeline (BACKED), cloud platform Flask+MySQL+React (BACKED), CI/CD .github/workflows/car-ci.yml (BACKED), Docker Dockerfile.car (BACKED), plate+traffic light detectors (BACKED), sensors icar_sensor_driver.py (BACKED), face recognition Django service (BACKED — actually implemented now, not future).
